core_mechanism: computing the joint invariants of an infinitesimal linear group action — the functions simultaneously annihilated by a family of first-order linear differential operators (vector fields) — by recasting that overdetermined system of first-order linear PDEs as an equivalent completely-integrable system of total (Pfaffian) differential equations
brief_reason: The abstract seeks the invariant functions of the algebra and finds them by replacing the traditional system of determining PDEs with the equivalent problem of solving a system of total differential equations.
